Description: All design and engineering labour across architectural, structural, mechanical, electrical, civil, and plumbing disciplines. Includes design management, production, drafting, BIM, QA, and coordination.
Project management, construction management, site supervision, cost estimating support, contract administration, and general administrative overhead.

Professional staff allocations spanning multiple functions (PM, superintendent, QA/QC lead, HSE manager, estimator). Used when agent reports staff as a composite allocation rather than function-specific.
Geotechnical investigation, regulatory compliance consulting (P.Eng. stamps, AAAL reviews), and specialty consulting services (existing conditions surveys, environmental).
Examples: Professional Services -- Geotechnical, Professional Services -- Regulatory, Professional Services -- Specialty

Description: All construction trade and general labour including carpenters, ironworkers, welders, concrete finishers, labourers, and multi-trade activities.
Examples: LABOUR, Construction Labour, Labour-Ironworker, Labour-Welder, CONST_LABOUR

Description: Electrician trade labour for rough-in, trim-out, termination, and installation activities.
Plumbing trade labour for rough-in, installation, and connection activities.
Structural concrete including foundations, grade beams, slabs on grade, equipment pads, service pit, stairs, curbs, and site concrete.
Structural steel framing, fabrication, erection, miscellaneous metals, anchor bolts, embedments, and connections.
Exterior wall systems (metal cladding, liner panels), building insulation (spray foam, batt, rigid), waterproofing, and air/vapour barrier systems.
Overhead doors, man doors, windows, hardware, frames, glazing, and door accessories.
Interior partitions (metal stud, drywall), flooring, painting, ceiling systems, fire protection, access panels, MEP openings, and interior fit-out.
HVAC heating units, air exchangers, makeup air units, ductwork, piping, fire/smoke dampers, MEP rough-in, and electrical connections for mechanical equipment.
HVAC controls, BMS integration, sensors, actuators, mechanical commissioning, test and balance (TAB).
Mechanical submittals, as-built documentation, O&M manuals, mechanical permits, logistics, and training.
Plumbing materials, fixtures, piping, demolition, sitework, testing, electrical connections, permits, and administration.
Electrical equipment (switchgear, panels, transformers), main service entrance, distribution, grounding/bonding, devices, and underground electrical.
Low voltage systems including data/communications cabling, security cameras, access control, and fire alarm.
Electrical commissioning, continuity testing, AHJ inspections, permits, as-built documentation, and coordination.
Major facility equipment including overhead cranes, anti-collision systems, specialty equipment, and equipment rental.
General and mixed materials, supply-and-install composites where material/labour not separated, and miscellaneous supplies.
Excavation, grading, compaction, fill, gravel surfacing, asphalt paving, landscaping, site restoration, and demolition.
Examples: Earthworks, EARTHWORK, Surfacing, SITE.GRAVEL, Landscaping, DEMOLITION

Description: Underground piping, conduit, storm/sanitary services, water lines, and temporary/permanent site services.
Examples: Underground Utilities, UNDERGROUND, Construction -- Site Services

Description: Utility company connections for electrical service, natural gas service, and communications/data service.
Examples: Utility -- Electrical, Utility -- Natural Gas, Utility -- Communications

Description: Integrated systems commissioning, functional testing, laboratory materials testing, third-party inspections, and verification.
Examples: COMMISSIONING, Commissioning, TESTING, Laboratory Testing, VERIFICATION

Description: Health/safety/environment management, QA/QC programs, inspections, deficiency tracking, environmental compliance.
Examples: SAFETY, HSE, QA_QC, Quality Assurance, ENVIRO

Description: Land surveys, as-built surveys, geotechnical field investigation (drilling, sampling, monitoring, restoration), and environmental investigation.
Examples: SURVEY, Survey, Field Investigation -- Mobilization, Field Investigation -- Drilling

Description: Building permits, safety code permits, inspection fees, regulatory fees, performance bonds, and insurance premiums.
Examples: Fees and Permits, Permits, PERMITS, Bonding, REGULATORY

Description: General conditions, temporary facilities, documentation/closeout, freight/logistics, procurement, preconstruction, specialty items, contingency, and indirect costs.
